question: Ask the user to enter their full name (which may include spaces). Read the entire line into an `std::string`. Then, print the full name back to the user and also display the total number of characters in the name.

test_cases.expected:
Please enter your full name: Full Name: John
Number of characters: 4

Please enter your full name: Full Name: Alice
Number of characters: 5

Please enter your full name: Full Name: SingleWordName
Number of characters: 14

errors: The program uses `std::cin >> fullName;` to read the input. This operator stops reading at the first whitespace character, meaning it only captures the first word of the user's full name. The question requires reading the entire line, including spaces, which should be done using `std::getline(std::cin, fullName);`.
